sources.title: Anthropic Salary: What Employees Actually Earn in 2026 | Fokal Research
sources.note: Reports Anthropic Applied AI Engineer (closest FDE-track analog) base ranging $220K (L3) to $340K (Staff), TC $300K-$1.2M, equity 60-70% of TC — useful shape reference but titles/leveling don't map 1:1 to a generic consulting-engineer archetype.

sources.title: OpenAI Forward Deployed Engineer Guide 2026 | fde.academy
sources.note: OpenAI FDE base ~$160K-$280K mid-level, TC $350K-$550K mid/senior, staff TC >$600K — confirms AI labs pay a large premium over faang-mag7 for this function, consistent with file's tier ordering.

sources.title: Senior Solutions Engineer: Average Salary & Pay Trends 2026 | Glassdoor
sources.note: Industry-wide (not FAANG-specific) average Senior Solutions Engineer salary ~$213,792; too broad and level-ambiguous to validate a specific L3 FAANG figure.

sources.title: FAANG Software Engineer Salary 2026 by Company | core-mba.pro
sources.note: Provides only core SWE bands, not PS/consulting-engineer-specific data; cited as evidence of the gap, not as direct support for the file's numbers.

sources.title: FAANG Software Engineer Salaries 2026 | Apex Interviewer
sources.note: Again only core SWE data (senior/E5 TC $300K-$700K depending on company); not a validated proxy for a PS/consulting title.

sources.title: Salary: Salesforce Professional Services 2026 | Glassdoor
sources.note: Salesforce PS average $167,631/yr, 90th pct $288,937 — matches file's L3 base p50 $131K + bonus p50 $39K = $170K cash total reasonably closely.

sources.title: Databricks Salaries | Levels.fyi
sources.note: Returned only general/SWE salary aggregation, not PS-specific, and Databricks is a large late-stage/public-adjacent company, not a clean growth-stage-private proxy.

sources.title: Solutions Engineer Salary in 2026: Real Data from 1.9 Million Job Postings | Recruiting From Scratch
sources.note: Median Solutions Engineer salary $170K across all company stages combined — consistent in magnitude with file's L4 base+bonus (~$199K) but not tier-specific enough to raise confidence.

sources.title: Series A Stage Startup Software Engineer Salary & Equity Data | Levels.fyi
sources.note: Reports Series A base near $135K for a comparable IC role (SWE, used as nearest proxy since no PS-specific startup data exists) — file's $117K L3 base is somewhat lower, plausible if positioned at 25th-40th percentile as commonly recommended for early-stage cash-conservative offers.

sources.title: Seed Stage Startup Software Engineer Salary & Equity Data | Levels.fyi
sources.note: Provides seed-stage SWE comp as a rough sanity-check baseline only; not role-matched.
